message.content:
Update 20 JIRA tickets. Cloud ID: 1ad24543-cd69-4ee1-82fc-d6a43602b380

For each ticket below:
1. Set parent to RECO-36
2. Update description with the corrected text provided (proper markdown, no literal 
)

Use editJiraIssue with fields like: {"parent": {"key": "RECO-36"}, "description": "the new description"}

Do them in parallel batches of 10.

content.text:
The `editJiraIssue` tool was denied permission. I need your approval to use it. The tool I was trying to use is `mcp__plugin_atlassian_atlassian__editJiraIssue` to update each of the 20 JIRA tickets (RECO-648 through RECO-667) with:

1. **Parent** set to `RECO-36`
2. **Description** updated with the formatted markdown text you provided

Each call uses the `fields` parameter with `{"parent": {"key": "RECO-36"}, "description": "..."}`.

Could you grant permission for this tool so I can proceed? Once allowed, I will re-run all 20 updates in two parallel batches of 10.
